reforms.description: An Industrial Development Fund has been created with the participation of the governments of the other Nordic countries to support industrial diversification in Iceland.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The fund aims to support industrial diversification, which is expected to enhance productivity and innovation in the economy.
reforms.status_evidence: The fund has been created and is operational.
reforms.importance_rationale: The fund represents a significant initiative to promote industrial diversification but does not constitute a major overhaul of the innovation system.
reforms.source_quote: An Industrial Development Fund has been created with the participation of the governments of the other Nordic countries.

reforms.description: An export credit scheme is being prepared to provide capital goods producers with financing facilities to enhance export capabilities.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The scheme aims to enhance export capabilities, which can lead to increased economic activity and innovation in the export sector.
reforms.status_evidence: The scheme is currently being prepared.
reforms.importance_rationale: The scheme is a significant initiative to support exporters but does not represent a fundamental change in the innovation landscape.
reforms.source_quote: An export credit scheme is being prepared to provide capital goods producers with financing facilities.
